response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the role. Their background is entirely in web, mobile, and general software development with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI hardware optimization experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach through workshops and community projects
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware design
Lacks exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of performance analysis in embedded systems or hardware-level bottlenecks
